data.body:
Goal:
When a take-loop agent exits cleanly without moving the knot forward or backward, Foolery should issue one follow-up prompt before treating the step as failed. Session and transport failures that are unrelated to the agent response must remain exempt.

Verification:
1. Add and run a targeted test where a take-loop child exits 0 after prompt delivery and leaves the knot in the same active state; expected result: exactly one follow-up prompt is issued before rollback handling.
2. Add and run targeted tests for spawn or prompt-delivery failure and external/session abort; expected result: no follow-up prompt is issued and existing error handling remains in place.

Constraints:
- Make the follow-up decision from the take-loop close path after post-exit state is observed.
- Do not rely on `result` or `onResult` to decide whether the take loop should continue.
- Follow-up must be one-shot per attempt.
data.title: Fix take-loop clean-close follow-up
